pr.title: [Non-record] 1-Stage Byte-level H-Net at 17.5M: Dynamic Chunking Learns Whitespace-aligned (Word-like) Boundaries (39x-91x fewer params than H-Net paper)

output.summary: Byte-level H-Net uses dynamic chunking in its E-M-D layout to learn whitespace-aligned chunks from raw bytes while matched ablations compare to subword runs.
techniques: dynamic chunking router for whitespace-aligned segmentation
matched byte260 vs sp1024 ablations with chunk metrics
